name: HiTi Digital, Inc.
summary: HiTi Digital, Inc. manufactures and supplies digital photo products and services in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers industrial, commercial, and consumer photo printers; card printers; order station/operation console products; print kit/consumables; and printer accessories. It also provides professional image software designed for passport/ID photo format. The company was formerly known as Hi-Touch Imaging Technologies Co., Ltd. and changed its name to HiTi Digital, Inc. in 2007. HiTi Digital, Inc. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
